---
title: "06_dydid"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup for analysis

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))


install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "tictoc",
  "glue",
  "fixest",
  "arrow"
))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs', "GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000")
dir_results <- here::here('results')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_results))

seed = 1234
set.seed(seed)


```


```{r}


dir_all <- file.path(dir_results, "tables", "all")

coef_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "coef_expanded_vcov.parquet")
)

subgroup_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "subgroup_run_summary.parquet")
)

support_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "event_time_support.parquet")
)

registry_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "run_registry.parquet")
)

spec_index_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "run_spec_index.parquet")
)


names(coef_tbl)
names(subgroup_tbl)
names(support_tbl)

coef_tbl |>
  count(vcov_id)

coef_tbl |>
  count(group_id, subgroup)

support_tbl |>
  arrange(group_id, subgroup, event_time)
```


# Functions

```{r}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x)) y else x
}


apply_saved_filters <- function(df, filters = list()) {
  if (length(filters) == 0) {
    return(df)
  }
  
  for (nm in names(filters)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(df)) {
      stop("Filter column not found in data: ", nm)
    }
    
    vals <- filters[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(vals)) {
      next
    }
    
    if (length(vals) == 1 && is.na(vals)) {
      df <- df |>
        dplyr::filter(is.na(.data[[nm]]))
    } else {
      df <- df |>
        dplyr::filter(.data[[nm]] %in% vals)
    }
  }
  
  df
}


format_n_label <- function(x, prefix = "n") {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(paste0(prefix, "=NA"))
  }
  
  if (length(x) == 1) {
    return(paste0(prefix, "=", format(x, big.mark = ",")))
  }
  
  paste0(
    prefix, "=",
    format(min(x), big.mark = ","),
    "–",
    format(max(x), big.mark = ",")
  )
}


make_legend_labels_with_n <- function(df,
                                      var,
                                      n_pt_col = "n_treated_units",
                                      n_event_col = "n_treated_events") {
  if (is.null(var)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (!var %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Legend variable not found in data: ", var)
  }
  
  if (!n_pt_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Point-count column not found in data: ", n_pt_col)
  }
  
  if (!n_event_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Event-count column not found in data: ", n_event_col)
  }
  
  lbl_tbl <- df |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      .data[[var]],
      subgroup_run_id,
      .data[[n_pt_col]],
      .data[[n_event_col]]
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[var]]) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_pt_lab = format_n_label(.data[[n_pt_col]], prefix = "pts"),
      n_event_lab = format_n_label(.data[[n_event_col]], prefix = "events"),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = paste0(.data[[var]], " (", n_pt_lab, ", ", n_event_lab, ")")
    )
  
  out <- lbl_tbl$label
  names(out) <- lbl_tbl[[var]]
  out
}


build_sunab_caption <- function(filters,
                                vcov_label = NULL,
                                show_ci = TRUE,
                                ci_level = 0.95,
                                n_min_ptids_event = 0,
                                n_min_fireids_event = 0,
                                n_min_ptids_subgroup = 0,
                                n_min_fireids_subgroup = 0) {
  ci_pct <- round(ci_level * 100)
  
  base_lines <- c(
    if (show_ci) {
      paste0(ci_pct, "% confidence intervals shown")
    } else {
      paste0(ci_pct, "% confidence intervals not shown")
    },
    "Sun-Abraham estimates used",
    paste0(
      "N limits on event-time: ",
      format(n_min_ptids_event, big.mark = ","), " pts, ",
      format(n_min_fireids_event, big.mark = ","), " events"
    ),
    paste0(
      "N limits on subgroup: ",
      format(n_min_ptids_subgroup, big.mark = ","), " pts, ",
      format(n_min_fireids_subgroup, big.mark = ","), " events"
    )
  )
  
  if (!is.null(vcov_label)) {
    base_lines <- c(
      base_lines,
      paste0("Standard errors: ", vcov_label)
    )
  }
  
  if (length(filters) > 0) {
    filter_lines <- purrr::imap_chr(
      filters,
      \(v, nm) {
        if (is.null(v)) {
          return(paste0(nm, ": NULL"))
        }
        
        if (length(v) == 1 && is.na(v)) {
          return(paste0(nm, ": NA"))
        }
        
        paste0(nm, ": ", paste(as.character(v), collapse = ", "))
      }
    )
    
    base_lines <- c(base_lines, filter_lines)
  }
  
  paste(base_lines, collapse = "\n")
}


plot_saved_sunab_general <- function(coef_tbl,
                                     filters = list(),
                                     color_var,
                                     linetype_var = NULL,
                                     facet_var = NULL,
                                     facet_ncol = NULL,
                                     facet_scales = "fixed",
                                     show_ci = TRUE,
                                     ci_style = c("ribbon", "lines"),
                                     title = NULL,
                                     subtitle = NULL,
                                     caption = NULL,
                                     baseline = -6,
                                     xlim = NULL,
                                     ylim = NULL,
                                     color_values = NULL,
                                     linetype_values = NULL,
                                     legend_title_color = NULL,
                                     legend_title_linetype = NULL,
                                     show_n = TRUE,
                                     n_legend_var = NULL,
                                     n_min_ptids_event = 0,
                                     n_min_fireids_event = 0,
                                     n_min_ptids_subgroup = 0,
                                     n_min_fireids_subgroup = 0,
                                     drop_na_estimate = TRUE,
                                     drop_baseline_term = FALSE,
                                     line_size = 0.9,
                                     point_size = 1.8,
                                     ribbon_alpha = 0.18,
                                     ci_line_alpha = 0.7,
                                     ci_level = 0.95) {
  
  ci_style <- match.arg(ci_style)
  
  needed_cols <- c(
    "term_value",
    "estimate",
    "ci_lower",
    "ci_upper",
    "subgroup_run_id",
    "coef_run_id",
    "n_ptids",
    "n_fireids",
    "n_treated_units",
    "n_treated_events"
  )
  
  missing_needed <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(coef_tbl))
  if (length(missing_needed) > 0) {
    stop(
      "coef_tbl is missing required columns: ",
      paste(missing_needed, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  aesthetic_vars <- c(color_var, linetype_var, facet_var)
  aesthetic_vars <- stats::na.omit(aesthetic_vars)
  missing_aes <- setdiff(aesthetic_vars, names(coef_tbl))
  if (length(missing_aes) > 0) {
    stop(
      "These aesthetic columns are missing from coef_tbl: ",
      paste(missing_aes, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  d <- coef_tbl |>
    apply_saved_filters(filters = filters)
  
  if ("term_matches_pattern" %in% names(d)) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$term_matches_pattern)
  }
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$term_value))
  
  if (drop_na_estimate) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$estimate))
  }
  
  if (drop_baseline_term) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$term_value != baseline)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(xlim)) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$term_value >= xlim[1], .data$term_value <= xlim[2])
  }
  
  subgroup_keep <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      subgroup_run_id,
      n_treated_units,
      n_treated_events
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      keep_subgroup =
        .data$n_treated_units >= n_min_ptids_subgroup &
        (
          is.na(.data$n_treated_events) |
            .data$n_treated_events >= n_min_fireids_subgroup
        )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$keep_subgroup) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data$subgroup_run_id)
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$subgroup_run_id %in% subgroup_keep)
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      keep_event_time =
        .data$n_ptids >= n_min_ptids_event &
        (
          is.na(.data$n_fireids) |
            .data$n_fireids >= n_min_fireids_event
        )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$keep_event_time)
  
  if (nrow(d) == 0) {
    
    vcov_labels <- unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(coef_tbl$vcov_label)))
    vcov_caption <- if (length(vcov_labels) == 1) vcov_labels else NULL
    
    caption_auto <- build_sunab_caption(
      filters = filters,
      vcov_label = vcov_caption,
      show_ci = show_ci,
      ci_level = ci_level,
      n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
      n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
      n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
      n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup
    )
    
    if (!is.null(caption)) {
      caption_auto <- paste(caption_auto, caption, sep = "\n")
    }
    
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
      ggplot2::geom_blank() +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = 0,
        linewidth = 0.6,
        linetype = "dotted",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_hline(
        yintercept = 0,
        linewidth = 0.4,
        linetype = "solid",
        color = "grey40"
      ) +
      ggplot2::labs(
        title = title,
        subtitle = subtitle,
        caption = caption_auto,
        x = "Event time",
        y = "Effect"
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
    
    if (!is.null(xlim) || !is.null(ylim)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
          xlim = xlim,
          ylim = ylim
        )
    }
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  outcomes <- unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(d$outcome)))
  y_label <- if (length(outcomes) == 1) {
    paste0("Effect on ", outcomes)
  } else {
    "Effect"
  }
  
  vcov_labels <- unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(d$vcov_label)))
  vcov_caption <- if (length(vcov_labels) == 1) {
    vcov_labels
  } else if (length(vcov_labels) > 1) {
    paste(vcov_labels, collapse = ", ")
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  
  caption_auto <- build_sunab_caption(
    filters = filters,
    vcov_label = vcov_caption,
    show_ci = show_ci,
    ci_level = ci_level,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup
  )
  
  if (!is.null(caption)) {
    caption_auto <- paste(caption_auto, caption, sep = "\n")
  }
  
  if (is.null(n_legend_var)) {
    n_legend_var <- dplyr::coalesce(color_var, linetype_var)
  }
  
  color_values_plot <- NULL
  linetype_values_plot <- NULL
  color_breaks <- NULL
  linetype_breaks <- NULL
  
  if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    color_labels <- if (show_n && identical(n_legend_var, color_var)) {
      make_legend_labels_with_n(d, color_var)
    } else {
      vals <- d |>
        dplyr::distinct(.data[[color_var]]) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data[[color_var]]) |>
        as.character()
      stats::setNames(vals, vals)
    }
    
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        color_plot = dplyr::recode(as.character(.data[[color_var]]), !!!color_labels)
      )
    
    color_breaks <- unname(color_labels)
    
    if (!is.null(color_values)) {
      if (is.null(names(color_values))) {
        stop("color_values must be a named vector.")
      }
      
      missing_color_names <- setdiff(names(color_labels), names(color_values))
      if (length(missing_color_names) > 0) {
        stop(
          "color_values is missing names for: ",
          paste(missing_color_names, collapse = ", ")
        )
      }
      
      color_values_plot <- color_values[names(color_labels)]
      names(color_values_plot) <- unname(color_labels)
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    linetype_labels <- if (show_n && identical(n_legend_var, linetype_var)) {
      make_legend_labels_with_n(d, linetype_var)
    } else {
      vals <- d |>
        dplyr::distinct(.data[[linetype_var]]) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data[[linetype_var]]) |>
        as.character()
      stats::setNames(vals, vals)
    }
    
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        linetype_plot = dplyr::recode(as.character(.data[[linetype_var]]), !!!linetype_labels)
      )
    
    linetype_breaks <- unname(linetype_labels)
    
    if (!is.null(linetype_values)) {
      if (is.null(names(linetype_values))) {
        stop("linetype_values must be a named vector.")
      }
      
      missing_lty_names <- setdiff(names(linetype_labels), names(linetype_values))
      if (length(missing_lty_names) > 0) {
        stop(
          "linetype_values is missing names for: ",
          paste(missing_lty_names, collapse = ", ")
        )
      }
      
      linetype_values_plot <- linetype_values[names(linetype_labels)]
      names(linetype_values_plot) <- unname(linetype_labels)
    }
  }
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$term_value) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      plot_group = interaction(
        .data$subgroup_run_id,
        .data$vcov_id,
        drop = TRUE,
        lex.order = TRUE
      )
    )
  
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    d,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = .data$term_value,
      y = .data$estimate,
      group = .data$plot_group
    )
  )
  
  if (show_ci && ci_style == "ribbon") {
    if (!is.null(color_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
          ggplot2::aes(
            ymin = .data$ci_lower,
            ymax = .data$ci_upper,
            fill = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = ribbon_alpha,
          linewidth = 0,
          show.legend = FALSE
        )
    } else {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
          ggplot2::aes(
            ymin = .data$ci_lower,
            ymax = .data$ci_upper
          ),
          alpha = ribbon_alpha,
          linewidth = 0
        )
    }
  }
  
  if (show_ci && ci_style == "lines") {
    if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(linetype_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_lower,
            color = .data$color_plot,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_upper,
            color = .data$color_plot,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_lower,
            color = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_upper,
            color = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_lower,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ci_upper,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(y = .data$ci_lower),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(y = .data$ci_upper),
          alpha = ci_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(
          color = .data$color_plot,
          linetype = .data$linetype_plot
        ),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(
        ggplot2::aes(
          color = .data$color_plot
        ),
        size = point_size
      )
  } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(
          color = .data$color_plot
        ),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(
        ggplot2::aes(
          color = .data$color_plot
        ),
        size = point_size
      )
  } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(
          linetype = .data$linetype_plot
        ),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = point_size)
  } else {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = line_size) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = point_size)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0,
      linewidth = 0.4,
      linetype = "solid",
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = baseline,
      linewidth = 0.4,
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linewidth = 0.6,
      linetype = "dotted",
      color = "red"
    )
  
  if (!is.null(facet_var)) {
    facet_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("~", facet_var))
    
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(
        facets = facet_formula,
        ncol = facet_ncol,
        scales = facet_scales
      )
  }
  
  if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(color_values_plot)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
        values = color_values_plot,
        breaks = color_breaks,
        name = legend_title_color %||% color_var
      )
    
    if (show_ci && ci_style == "ribbon") {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
          values = color_values_plot,
          breaks = color_breaks,
          guide = "none"
        )
    }
  } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::labs(color = legend_title_color %||% color_var)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var) && !is.null(linetype_values_plot)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(
        values = linetype_values_plot,
        breaks = linetype_breaks,
        name = legend_title_linetype %||% linetype_var
      )
  } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::labs(linetype = legend_title_linetype %||% linetype_var)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle,
      caption = caption_auto,
      x = "Event time",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  if (!is.null(xlim) || !is.null(ylim)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
        xlim = xlim,
        ylim = ylim
      )
  }
  
  p
}
```

```{r}


make_named_palette <- function(levels,
                               palette = "Okabe-Ito") {
  
  levels <- unique(as.character(levels))
  
  vals <- grDevices::palette.colors(
    length(levels),
    palette = palette
  )
  
  names(vals) <- levels
  
  vals
}

make_named_palette_from_tbl <- function(tbl,
                                        var,
                                        palette = "Okabe-Ito",
                                        levels = NULL,
                                        sort_levels = TRUE) {
  
  if (!var %in% names(tbl)) {
    stop("Column not found in table: ", var)
  }
  
  if (is.null(levels)) {
    
    levels <- tbl |>
      dplyr::distinct(.data[[var]]) |>
      dplyr::pull(.data[[var]]) |>
      as.character()
    
    if (sort_levels) {
      levels <- sort(levels)
    }
    
  } else {
    
    levels <- as.character(levels)
    
  }
  
  if (length(levels) == 0) {
    stop("No levels found for palette.")
  }
  
  vals <- grDevices::palette.colors(
    n = length(levels),
    palette = palette
  )
  
  names(vals) <- levels
  
  vals
}

```

# Make plots

```{r}

grDevices::palette.pals()

subgroup_pal <- make_named_palette(
  levels = c("f", "bf", "df", "bdf"),
  palette = "Okabe-Ito"
)

subgroup_pal <- c(
  f   = "red3",
  bf  = "forestgreen",
  df  = "goldenrod2",
  bdf = "purple"
)

analysis_pal <- make_named_palette_from_tbl(
  coef_tbl,
  var = "analysis_id",
  palette = "Polychrome 36"
)

n_min_ptids_event <- 20
n_min_fireids_event <- 2
n_min_ptids_subgroup <- 50
n_min_fireids_subgroup <- 5


```


# Examine differences across outcome
```{r}

dir_outcome_compare <- here::here(dir_figs, "outcome_compare")
dir_ensure(dir_outcome_compare)

for(analysis_id in unique(coef_tbl$analysis_id)) {
  p1 <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
    coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
    filters = list(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
      #outcome = "rap_tree",
      vcov_id = "cluster_eco4",
      model_id = "b_pdsi_sunab_twfe"
    ),
    color_var = "subgroup",
    color_values = subgroup_pal,
    linetype_var = NULL,
   facet_var = "outcome",
   facet_ncol = 2,
   facet_scales = "fixed",
    legend_title_color = "Subgroup",
   legend_title_linetype = NULL,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup,
    show_ci = TRUE,
    ci_style = "ribbon",
    title = analysis_id,
   subtitle = NULL,
   baseline = -6,
    xlim = c(-10, 20),
    ylim = c(-50, 10),
   show_n = TRUE,
   n_legend_var = NULL,
   line_size = 1,
   point_size = 1.8,
   ribbon_alpha = 0.2,
   ci_line_alpha = 0.7,
   ci_level = 0.95
  )
  
  print(p1)
  
  ggsave(here::here(dir_outcome_compare, glue::glue("outcome_compare_{analysis_id}.png")),
       units = "px",
       width = 4000,
       height = 2000)
}

```


# Examine impact of different standard errors


```{r}

dir_se_compare <- here::here(dir_figs, "se_compare")
dir_ensure(dir_se_compare)

for(analysis_id in unique(coef_tbl$analysis_id)) {
  p1 <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
    coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
    filters = list(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
      outcome = "rap_tree",
      #vcov_id = vcov_id,
      model_id = "b_pdsi_sunab_twfe"
    ),
    color_var = "subgroup",
    color_values = subgroup_pal,
    linetype_var = NULL,
   facet_var = "vcov_id",
   facet_ncol = 4,
   facet_scales = "fixed",
    legend_title_color = "Subgroup",
   legend_title_linetype = NULL,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup,
    show_ci = TRUE,
    ci_style = "ribbon",
    title = analysis_id,
   subtitle = NULL,
   baseline = -6,
    xlim = c(-15, 20),
    ylim = c(-50, 10),
   show_n = TRUE,
   n_legend_var = NULL,
   line_size = 1,
   point_size = 1.8,
   ribbon_alpha = 0.2,
   ci_line_alpha = 0.7,
   ci_level = 0.95
  )
  
  print(p1)
  ggsave(here::here(dir_se_compare, glue::glue("se_compare_{analysis_id}.png")),
         units = "px",
         width = 4000,
         height = 2000)
}


```



# Examine differences across thresholds
```{r}

dir_threshold_compare <- here::here(dir_figs, "threshold_compare")
dir_ensure(dir_threshold_compare)

for(analysis_id in unique(coef_tbl$analysis_id)) {
  p1 <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
    coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
    filters = list(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      #group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
      outcome = "rap_tree",
      vcov_id = "cluster_eco4",
      model_id = "b_pdsi_sunab_twfe"
    ),
    color_var = "subgroup",
    color_values = subgroup_pal,
    linetype_var = NULL,
   facet_var = "group_id",
   facet_ncol = 2,
   facet_scales = "fixed",
    legend_title_color = "Subgroup",
   legend_title_linetype = NULL,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup,
    show_ci = TRUE,
    ci_style = "ribbon",
    title = analysis_id,
   subtitle = NULL,
   baseline = -6,
    xlim = c(-10, 20),
    ylim = c(-50, 10),
   show_n = TRUE,
   n_legend_var = NULL,
   line_size = 1,
   point_size = 1.8,
   ribbon_alpha = 0.2,
   ci_line_alpha = 0.7,
   ci_level = 0.95
  )
  
  print(p1)
  
  ggsave(here::here(dir_threshold_compare, glue::glue("threshold_compare_{analysis_id}.png")),
       units = "px",
       width = 4000,
       height = 2000)
}

```



# Examine differences across B threshold
```{r}

dir_b_threshold_compare <- here::here(dir_figs, "b_threshold_compare")
dir_ensure(dir_b_threshold_compare)

for(analysis_id in unique(coef_tbl$analysis_id)) {
  p1 <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
    coef_tbl = coef_tbl |> filter((group_id == "b10_pdsisumn10" | group_id == "b25_pdsisumn10") & subgroup == "bf"),
    filters = list(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      #group_id = c("b10_pdsisum10", "b25_psdisum10"),
      #outcome = "rap_tree",
      vcov_id = "cluster_eco4",
      model_id = "b_pdsi_sunab_twfe"
    ),
    color_var = "subgroup",
    color_values = subgroup_pal,
    linetype_var = "group_id",
   facet_var = "outcome",
   facet_ncol = 2,
   facet_scales = "fixed",
    legend_title_color = "Subgroup",
   legend_title_linetype = NULL,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup,
    show_ci = TRUE,
    ci_style = "ribbon",
    title = analysis_id,
   subtitle = NULL,
   baseline = -6,
    xlim = c(-10, 20),
    ylim = c(-50, 10),
   show_n = TRUE,
   n_legend_var = NULL,
   line_size = 1,
   point_size = 1.8,
   ribbon_alpha = 0.2,
   ci_line_alpha = 0.7,
   ci_level = 0.95
  )
  
  print(p1)
  
  ggsave(here::here(dir_b_threshold_compare, glue::glue("b_threshold_compare_{analysis_id}.png")),
       units = "px",
       width = 4000,
       height = 2000)
}

```



# Joint F tests

```{r}
compute_pretrend_joint_test <- function(run_id,
                                        coef_tbl,
                                        registry_tbl,
                                        event_times = -11:-6,
                                        use_ginv = TRUE) {
  
  reg_row <- registry_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$run_id == !!run_id) |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      run_id,
      analysis_id,
      outcome,
      group_id,
      model_id,
      vcov_file
    )
  
  if (nrow(reg_row) != 1) {
    stop("Expected exactly 1 registry row for run_id: ", run_id)
  }
  
  vcov_path <- reg_row$vcov_file[[1]]
  vcov_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(vcov_path)
  
  coef_run <- coef_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$run_id == !!run_id) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$term_value %in% event_times)
  
  if (nrow(coef_run) == 0) {
    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        run_id = run_id,
        analysis_id = reg_row$analysis_id[[1]],
        outcome = reg_row$outcome[[1]],
        group_id = reg_row$group_id[[1]],
        model_id = reg_row$model_id[[1]],
        subgroup = NA_character_,
        vcov_id = NA_character_,
        vcov_label = NA_character_,
        event_time_start = min(event_times),
        event_time_end = max(event_times),
        n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
        n_terms_tested = 0L,
        df_num = 0L,
        F_stat = NA_real_,
        chisq_stat = NA_real_,
        p_value = NA_real_,
        status = "no_matching_terms_in_coef_tbl"
      )
    )
  }
  
  out <- coef_run |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$subgroup, .data$vcov_id, .data$vcov_label) |>
    dplyr::group_modify(\(d, keys) {
      
      term_names <- unique(d$term)
      
      vc_sub <- vcov_tbl |>
        dplyr::filter(
          .data$subgroup == keys$subgroup[[1]],
          .data$vcov_id == keys$vcov_id[[1]],
          .data$term_i %in% term_names,
          .data$term_j %in% term_names
        ) |>
        dplyr::select(term_i, term_j, vcov_value)
      
      if (nrow(vc_sub) == 0) {
        return(
          tibble::tibble(
            n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
            n_terms_tested = 0L,
            df_num = 0L,
            F_stat = NA_real_,
            chisq_stat = NA_real_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            status = "no_matching_vcov_entries"
          )
        )
      }
      
      # build square matrix in a fully controlled way
      terms_keep <- sort(unique(intersect(term_names, union(vc_sub$term_i, vc_sub$term_j))))
      
      if (length(terms_keep) == 0) {
        return(
          tibble::tibble(
            n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
            n_terms_tested = 0L,
            df_num = 0L,
            F_stat = NA_real_,
            chisq_stat = NA_real_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            status = "no_overlapping_terms"
          )
        )
      }
      
      V_long <- tidyr::expand_grid(
        term_i = terms_keep,
        term_j = terms_keep
      ) |>
        dplyr::left_join(vc_sub, by = c("term_i", "term_j"))
      
      if (any(is.na(V_long$vcov_value))) {
        return(
          tibble::tibble(
            n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
            n_terms_tested = length(terms_keep),
            df_num = length(terms_keep),
            F_stat = NA_real_,
            chisq_stat = NA_real_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            status = "missing_vcov_entries"
          )
        )
      }
      
      V <- V_long |>
        tidyr::pivot_wider(
          names_from = term_j,
          values_from = vcov_value
        ) |>
        tibble::column_to_rownames("term_i") |>
        as.matrix()
      
      V <- V[terms_keep, terms_keep, drop = FALSE]
      V <- (V + t(V)) / 2
      
      b_vec <- d |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$term %in% terms_keep) |>
        dplyr::distinct(.data$term, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
        dplyr::mutate(term = factor(.data$term, levels = terms_keep)) |>
        dplyr::arrange(.data$term) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data$estimate)
      
      q <- length(b_vec)
      
      if (q == 0) {
        return(
          tibble::tibble(
            n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
            n_terms_tested = 0L,
            df_num = 0L,
            F_stat = NA_real_,
            chisq_stat = NA_real_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            status = "no_coefficients_after_alignment"
          )
        )
      }
      
      V_inv <- tryCatch(
        solve(V),
        error = function(e) {
          if (!use_ginv) {
            return(NULL)
          }
          tryCatch(MASS::ginv(V), error = function(e2) NULL)
        }
      )
      
      if (is.null(V_inv)) {
        return(
          tibble::tibble(
            n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
            n_terms_tested = q,
            df_num = q,
            F_stat = NA_real_,
            chisq_stat = NA_real_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            status = "matrix_inversion_failed"
          )
        )
      }
      
      b_mat <- matrix(b_vec, ncol = 1)
      chisq_stat <- as.numeric(t(b_mat) %*% V_inv %*% b_mat)
      F_stat <- chisq_stat / q
      p_value <- stats::pchisq(chisq_stat, df = q, lower.tail = FALSE)
      
      tibble::tibble(
        n_terms_requested = length(event_times),
        n_terms_tested = q,
        df_num = q,
        F_stat = F_stat,
        chisq_stat = chisq_stat,
        p_value = p_value,
        status = "ok"
      )
    }) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      run_id = run_id,
      analysis_id = reg_row$analysis_id[[1]],
      outcome = reg_row$outcome[[1]],
      group_id = reg_row$group_id[[1]],
      model_id = reg_row$model_id[[1]],
      event_time_start = min(event_times),
      event_time_end = max(event_times)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      "run_id",
      "analysis_id",
      "outcome",
      "group_id",
      "model_id",
      "subgroup",
      "vcov_id",
      "vcov_label",
      "event_time_start",
      "event_time_end",
      "n_terms_requested",
      "n_terms_tested",
      "df_num",
      "F_stat",
      "chisq_stat",
      "p_value",
      "status"
    )
  
  out
}


pretrend_tests <- purrr::map_dfr(
  unique(coef_tbl$run_id)[1],
  compute_pretrend_joint_test,
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
  registry_tbl = registry_tbl,
  event_times = -11:-6
)



I also need to filter out any coefficients that don't have adequate sample size. the compute_pretrend_joint_test should also accept parameters like this, and then only do the computations on the coefficients and subgroups that pass the thresholds for support:
n_min_ptids_event <- 20
n_min_fireids_event <- 2
n_min_ptids_subgroup <- 50
n_min_fireids_subgroup <- 5

vc <- arrow::read_parquet(registry_tbl$vcov_file[[1]])

glimpse(vc)


```



# Findings

PDSI3T is the least restrictive, usually resulting in a BDF line
PDSI4T is the most restrictive





<button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" >Click to see Session Information</button><div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse"><div>

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
